title: Blaze's magic adventure Forge
description:
A magical wold to explore 
but watch yoor back something is watching you
body:
### **A modpack focust on magic bosses dimantions and world generation.**

Made to explore the buteful worlds in this modpack,
Fhiting hard bosses,
And building the best structures you can think of.

Also this modpack is optimized by sodium and has dynamic lighting to macke the wold even more buteful that it was.

![what is that.....](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a3652e827b970c3b1cf68f7bc41658cc6096086e_0.webp)

but sumthing is waching you...

defeat it or ...
